name: auris
description: Auris monorepo — API-first study-audio engine, WhatsApp demo client, and React admin.

scripts.test: npm test --prefix auris/engine && npm test --prefix auris/whatsapp && npm test --prefix auris/admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix auris/engine && npm run typecheck --prefix auris/whatsapp && npm run typecheck --prefix auris/admin
